assertions.assertion: Uses ConfigureOpenIdConnect with Authority, ClientId, ClientSecret, ResponseType='code', and SaveTokens=true
assertions.rationale: Uses manual AddOpenIdConnect instead of ConfigureOpenIdConnect

assertions.assertion: Middleware order is UseRouting -> UseAuthentication -> UseBff -> UseAuthorization
Does NOT manually call AddAuthentication().AddCookie().AddOpenIdConnect() — uses the v4 fluent API instead
assertions.rationale: Manually calls AddAuthentication().AddCookie().AddOpenIdConnect() — this is the v3 pattern, not v4
